redis.clients.jedis.commands

Interface PipelineCommands

  • All Superinterfaces:
    FunctionPipelineCommands, GeoPipelineCommands, HashPipelineCommands, HyperLogLogPipelineCommands, KeyPipelineCommands, ListPipelineCommands, SampleKeyedPipelineCommands, ScriptingKeyPipelineCommands, SetPipelineCommands, SortedSetPipelineCommands, StreamPipelineCommands, StringPipelineCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ClusterPipeline, MultiNodePipelineBase, Pipeline, ReliableTransaction, ShardedPipeline, Transaction, TransactionBase

    public interface PipelineCommands
extends KeyPipelineCommands, StringPipelineCommands, ListPipelineCommands, HashPipelineCommands, SetPipelineCommands, SortedSetPipelineCommands, GeoPipelineCommands, HyperLogLogPipelineCommands, StreamPipelineCommands, ScriptingKeyPipelineCommands, SampleKeyedPipelineCommands, FunctionPipelineCommands
